creator: reg@shale.csir.co.za
text:
Hi,

On Sun, Apr 04, 1999 at 04:20:32PM -0700, mharo@area51.fremont.ca.us wrote:
> 	- path for MASTER_SITE_GNOME.  They added a sources directory.
> 	- Added 2 more servers

DO NOT commit the patch with the sources directory.  The ports are
broken, not bsd.port.mk.  Patches will be coming soon, unless someone
else fixes them.

Adding other master sites is fine, although this seems to have geo.net
in twice...  I know that site is fast for me but not that fast ;). 
Maybe add some sites outside the US?

Regards,
 -Jeremy

-- 
  |   "I could be anything I wanted to, but one things true
--+--  Never gonna be as big as Jesus, never gonna hold the world in my hand
  |    Never gonna be as big as Jesus, never gonna build a promised land
  |    But that's, that's all right, OK with me..." -Audio Adrenaline
